title: torilis arvensis subsp. heterophylla
intro: Torilis arvensis subsp. heterophylla, also known as the Rough Chervil or Wild Chervil, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Torilis arvensis subsp. heterophylla include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or added to other herbal formulas.
